items.title: My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: Although he couldn’t talk directly about Giannis Antetokounmpo, I asked Jeff Weltman about the idea that the #Magic are a “dark horse” team.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
My latest for @orlandosentinel.com: Although he couldn’t talk directly about Giannis Antetokounmpo, I asked Jeff Weltman about the idea that the #Magic are a “dark horse” team.

“… That conversation speaks to the talent on this roster,” Weltman told me.

More: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/06/19/o...

media.title: Magic mention in Giannis trade rumors ‘speaks to the talent on this roster,’ team president says
media.description: As recently as Tuesday, ESPN’s Ramona Shelburne referred to the Orlando Magic as a “dark horse” team to acquire Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Hanno Möttölä. Finnish PF went to Utah was drafted 40th in 2000 by ATL.  Made team as jump shooting big (4.6 ppg 3 rpg in 15 mpg from 2000-02). After 02, went to Europe where he played all over thru 2013. Coached in Finland from 2014-24. Now coaching in Australia.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Hanno Möttölä. Finnish PF went to Utah was drafted 40th in 2000 by ATL.  Made team as jump shooting big (4.6 ppg 3 rpg in 15 mpg from 2000-02). After 02, went to Europe where he played all over thru 2013. Coached in Finland from 2014-24. Now coaching in Australia.
